settings.title: Our Top Products

settings.title: Ultra Fast Charging
settings.description: GaN technology delivers up to 140W — charge your laptop and phone simultaneously at full speed.

settings.title: High Capacity
settings.description: Power banks up to 26800mAh keep your devices running all day, even on the longest trips.

settings.title: Universal Compatibility
settings.description: Works with iPhone, Android, iPad, MacBook and any USB-C or USB-A device.

settings.title: Safety Certified
settings.description: CE, FCC and RoHS certified with over-voltage, over-current and short-circuit protection.

settings.title: Fast & Free Shipping
settings.description: Free tracked shipping on orders over $50. Most orders dispatched within 24 hours.

settings.title: Hassle-Free Returns
settings.description: Not happy? Return within 30 days for a full refund — no questions asked.

settings.review: The 65W GaN charger is a game-changer. Tiny, yet charges my MacBook AND iPhone simultaneously. Absolutely love it!
settings.name: Alex M.
settings.label: Verified Buyer ✓

settings.review: Ordered the 20000mAh power bank for a camping trip — it charged my phone 5 times and still had juice. Incredible value!
settings.name: Sarah K.
settings.label: Verified Buyer ✓

settings.review: Super fast shipping and the product is exactly as described. The braided cable feels premium. Will definitely buy again.
